reference: Hi doctor, please help me. I took a semen analysis test yesterday. The results are shown below. Sir, please analyze and tell me if my condition is normal or not. Can I become a father? Sperm count is ninety-nine million. Sperm motility is: progressive motile - twenty-six%, non-progressive - thirty%, immotile - forty-four%. pH - eight, volume - one, normal forms of sperms - ninety-six% and abnormal are four%. Pus cells are four-six%.
text: hi doctor please help me i took a semen analysis test yesterday the results are shown below sir please analyze and tell me if my condition is normal or not can i become a father sperm count is 99 million sperm motility is progressive motile 26 percent non-progressive percent immotile 44 percent ph eight for volume one normal forms of sperms 96 and abnormal of 4 plus awful 6
